product.name: CTILTS4020100Enhanced
product.description: Tandy 40MPa Tilt up concrete is designed to comply with the requirements of AS1379 - Specification and supply of concrete. Our technical expertise ensures that tilt-up panels made with this concrete gain sufficient early strength to enable their lifting and placing without damage to the panel.
